title: Laggy Printers
description: Adds a laggy printer block that does nothing.
body:
### **Adds a printer block**

**The printer block does nothing in reality. You can use it though by right clicking the printer with paper in your main hand but it does nothing.** Keep in mind that this is one of the smallest projects I have ever made, I have made many other mods!

This mod was made by the youtuber Vision - 
[YouTube Link](https://www.youtube.com/@Vision_Minecraft/featured)
